• J. Shim, C. Mastalli, T. Corberes, S. Tonneau, V. Ivan, and S. Vijayakumar, “Topology-Based MPC for Automatic Footstep Placement and Contact Surface Selection”, International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023. [Paper] [Video]


  • C. Mastalli*, W. Merkt*, G. Xin, J. Shim, M. Mistry, I. Havoutis, and S. Vijayakumar, “Agile Maneuvers in Legged Robots: a Predictive Control Approach”, Under Review, 2023. [Paper] [Video]
